Video.summary: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard.
Video.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake

Video.summary: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband.
Video.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down

Video.summary: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen.
Video.title: The Car That Rolled Away

Video.summary: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers.
Video.title: Naked and Dangerous

Video.summary: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife.
Video.title: Hooligans and Explosions

Video.summary: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car?
Video.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian.
Video.title: Heavy Hitters

Video.summary: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy.
Video.title: Ruffians and Wrestlers

Video.summary: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians.
Video.title: Everybody Just a Child?

Video.summary: Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck.
Video.title: Off the Hitch

Video.summary: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything.
Video.title: Matt & Froy Auto Recovery

Video.summary: Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car.
Video.title: Win Some, Quarrelsome, Lose Some

Video.summary: Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center.
Video.title: We Weren't Informed

Video.summary: Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered.
Video.title: Tijuana Surprise

Video.summary: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers.
Video.title: Lyndah's Revenge

Video.summary: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana.
Video.title: El Prisionero

Video.summary: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job.
Video.title: The Final Showdown

Video.summary: Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity.
Video.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?

Video.summary: Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments.
Video.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Image.alt: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Video.summary: things get hairy when Sonia and Lyndah repo from outside a wig shop.
Video.title: Hairy Situations

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees.
Video.title: Business Issues

Video.summary: a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber.
Video.title: Wrench in the Works

Video.summary: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo.
Video.title: It Ain't No Joke!

Video.summary: Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car.
Video.title: We Are

Video.summary: Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer.
Video.title: Collectibles

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew.
Video.title: Adult Film Star

Video.summary: Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement.
Video.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Image.alt: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Video.summary: Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck.
Video.title: Exterminate or Retaliate

Video.summary: Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor.
Video.title: Unwanted Seizures

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia.
Video.title: Pepper Spray and Guns

Video.summary: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo.
Video.title: Burning Up

Video.summary: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel.
Video.title: Getting the Axe

Video.summary: Tensions between Lou and Matt continue to boil when Matt enlists his daughter's aid on another job.
Video.title: The Rift

Video.summary: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.
Video.title: The Final Shot

Video.summary: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay.
Video.title: What the Truck?!?

Video.summary: The repo team is back!
Video.title: Contact

Video.summary: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles.
Video.title: The Crush

Video.summary: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career.
Video.title: Daddy's Little Girl

Video.summary: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance.
Video.title: The Junior Partner

Video.summary: Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company.
Video.title: Hard Turns Ahead

Video.summary: Matt starts making some big business calls.
Video.title: Minutes of Fame

Video.summary: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount.
Video.title: New Truck Day

Video.summary: The repo team's new truck finally arrives.
Video.title: A Blow to the Head
